rationale: This Qodo issue comment is a walkthrough summary of the PR rather than a distinct remediation item.
This Qodo review body duplicates the underlying line comments that were classified individually in the ledger.
SendMessage now accepts only the canonical top-level message field, and the new tests reject fallback alias payloads so the contract stays fail-fast.
This review entry is a high-level summary rather than an additional actionable comment.
WorkflowEnvironment-based tests now invoke SendMessage through the real Temporal update boundary and cover both success and degraded invalid-input behavior.
The service and workflow now share the same canonical SendMessage contract, so nested and alias payload shapes no longer diverge between layers.
Update-backed intervention failures now report Temporal update failed, matching the actual transport used by the service.
Pause intervention audit entries now record temporal_update as the transport.
Resume intervention audit entries now record temporal_update as the transport.
Approve intervention audit entries now record temporal_update as the transport.
SendMessage intervention audit entries now record temporal_update as the transport.
MoonMind.Run intervention updates are now rejected on the generic update path so pause, resume, approve, and cancel go through the single audited signal or cancel endpoints.
The multiline assert_awaited_once_with call was reformatted with Black-compliant indentation.
This review entry is a PR overview summary and does not add separate actionable feedback beyond the concrete line comments.
